notes: Google Places 'Table A' type values for --category. Picked for high conversion odds: owner-operated, single decision-maker, personal mobile number usually listed as contact (unlike hospitals/institutions).

recommended.reason: Single owner/manager, budget-conscious, cares about local discovery
Owner-operated, image-conscious, likely underinvested in web presence
Same profile as restaurants, which converted well in testing
